children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Pecan Marketing Board established in .section 6005(b) of this title

children.heading: Commerce
children.label: 2 Commerce
children.text: The term “commerce” means interstate, foreign, or intrastate commerce.

children.heading: Conflict of interest
children.label: 3 Conflict of interest
children.text: The term “conflict of interest” means a situation in which a member has a direct or indirect financial interest in a corporation, partnership, sole proprietorship, joint venture, or other business entity dealing directly or indirectly with the Board.

children.heading: Consumer information
children.label: 4 Consumer information
children.text: The term “consumer information” means information and programs that will assist consumers and other persons in making evaluations and decisions regarding the purchase, preparation, and use of pecans.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 5 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Agriculture.

children.heading: District
children.label: 6 District
children.text: The term “district” means a geographical area of the United States, as determined by the Board and approved by the Secretary, in which there is produced approximately one-fourth of the volume of pecans produced in the United States.

children.heading: First handler
children.label: 7 First handler
children.text: The term “first handler” means the first person who buys or takes possession of pecans from a grower for marketing. If a grower markets pecans directly to consumers, such grower shall be considered the first handler with respect to pecans grown by such grower.

children.heading: Grower
children.label: 8 Grower
children.text: The term “grower” means any person engaged in the production and sale of pecans in the United States who owns, or who shares the ownership and risk of loss of, such pecans.

children.label: A
children.text: shells pecans, or has pecans shelled for such person, in the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: during the immediately previous year, grew 50 percent or more of the pecans such person shelled or had shelled for such person.

children.heading: Handle
children.label: 10 Handle
children.text: The term “handle” means receipt of in-shell pecans by a sheller or first handler, including pecans produced by such sheller or first handler.

children.heading: Importer
children.label: 11 Importer
children.text: The term “importer” means any person who imports pecans from outside of the United States for sale in the United States.

children.heading: Industry information
children.label: 12 Industry information
children.text: The term “industry information” means information and programs that will lead to the development of new markets and marketing strategies, increased efficiency, and activities to enhance the image of the pecan industry.

children.heading: In-shell pecan
children.label: 13 In-shell pecan
children.text: The term “in-shell pecan” means a pecan that has a shell that has not been removed.

children.heading: To market
children.label: 14 To market
children.text: The term “to market” means to sell or offer to dispose of pecans in any channel of commerce.

children.heading: Member
children.label: 15 Member
children.text: The term “member” means a member of the Board.

children.heading: Pecan
children.label: 16 Pecan
children.text: The term “pecan” means the nut of the pecan tree carya illinoensis.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 17 Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, group of individuals, partnership, corporation, association, cooperative, or any other entity.

children.heading: Plan
children.label: 18 Plan
children.text: The term “plan” means a plan issued under .section 6003 of this title

children.heading: Promotion
children.label: 19 Promotion
children.text: The term “promotion” means any action taken by the Board, pursuant to this chapter, to present a favorable image of pecans to the public with the express intent of improving the competitive position of pecans in the marketplace and stimulating sales of pecans, including paid advertising.

children.heading: Research
children.label: 20 Research
children.text: The term “research” means any type of test, study, or analysis designed to advance the image, desirability, usage, marketability, production, product development, or quality of pecans.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 21 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Shell
children.label: 22 Shell
children.text: The term “shell” means to remove the shell from an in-shell pecan.

children.heading: Shelled pecan
children.label: 23 Shelled pecan
children.text: The term “shelled pecan” means a pecan kernel, or portion of a kernel, after the pecan shell has been removed.

children.label: A
children.text: shells pecans or has pecans shelled for the account of such person; and

children.label: B
children.text: during the immediately previous year, purchased more than 50 percent of the pecans such person shelled or had shelled for such account.

children.heading: State
children.label: 25 State
children.text: The term “State” means any of the several States, the District of Columbia and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 26 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means collectively the several States, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.
